历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3146 → 2536 → 2917 → 3126 → 3272, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024–2025, rankings moved backward for two consecutive years (numbers increased), with a baseline of about 3272 in 2025 and a cumulative backward shift of about 146 over the past two years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 312 in 2021, 281 in 2022, 289 in 2023, 294 in 2024, and 287 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 253, a reduction of about 11.8% compared to 2025, significantly decreasing supply and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 9th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025–2026, firmly in the national Top 10, with an extremely high academic level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (64 negative events out of 99), mainly involving campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management controversies; Douyin popularity ranks 19th overall (high heat), with significant short video exposure; the 2025 reputation evaluation is clearly negative.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is highly recommended, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Stomatology is recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended; Wuhan University's advantageous majors highly overlap with current popular majors, maintaining high application enthusiasm; the total number of Physics Category candidates was about 320,000 in 2025, increasing to about 347,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 8.4%), further intensifying competition; the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 in 2024, but ranking competition remains fierce; Wuhan University is located in Hubei (neighboring province), naturally attracting Hunan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion for Physics Category in Hunan Province is about 2.5% (2024 data), with moderate cross-provincial enrollment scale; negative public opinion may suppress some candidates' application psychology, but Wuhan University's traditional prestige remains strong; Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Geophysics A+, Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Water Conservancy Engineering A, Biology A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Software Engineering A-, Stomatology A-, Civil Engineering A-, etc., with comprehensive strength in science, engineering, and medicine, strongly attracting high-scoring science candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 3272, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.8% significantly intensifying competition, the increase of about 8.4% in Hunan Physics Category candidates further raising competition, the somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, the high overlap of popular majors like Computer Science/Electronic Information/Electrical Engineering with Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines continuously attracting high-scoring candidates, and the Soft Science ranking rising to 8th enhancing the university's appeal, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3119, with a range of 2763–3475.

Overall, negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Business Administration A, etc., with outstanding strength in liberal arts advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical category in Hunan Province over the past five years are: 2021: 3146th (planned 21 students), 2022: 2085th (planned 43 students), 2023: 1700th (planned 39 students), 2024: 2730th (planned 16 students), 2025: 3975th (planned 18 students). It can be seen that rankings continuously rose (easier admission) from 2021 to 2023, but dropped significantly from 2024 onward, falling to 3975th in 2025, the lowest in five years. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 17 students, a reduction of 1 student (about 5.6%) compared to 18 in 2025. This reduction will further intensify competition, pushing rankings even lower.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. The university has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical disciplines, leveraging the advantages of a comprehensive university, enjoy a high reputation in fields such as stomatology and clinical medicine, maintaining sustained appeal to Hunan Province examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with long-term programs such as clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring examinees. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, exerting a strong geographical attraction for Hunan Province examinees. The enrollment scale for medical categories within Hunan Province is limited, and competition is fierce, so the application heat is expected to remain unabated in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in Hunan Province in 2026 will be approximately 3793rd, further declining (harder admission) compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 3603rd and 3983rd. It is recommended that examinees position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
